description.unified: Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by [35%->20%] and reduces Status Resistance by 320 for 5sec. [(removed) additionally uses [Absorbing Strike]]
Deals Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by [50%->60%].
Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains [Harvest] stacks 1. [Harvest]: Increases ATK, stacking up to 10 times.
Cooldown is reduced by [3 sec->2 sec]. [(removed) Mana cost increased by 1000]

dark.unified: Damage increases by 50%. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 2000, but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow]. [(removed) damage is increased by 80%]

dark.unified: Damage is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) DMG is increased by 40%]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [2000->1000], but triggers [Harvest] once.

dark.unified: Mana recovery per second increases by [50%->10%] per stack.

light.unified: If stacks are [5->6] or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

dark.unified: When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by 4% and Armor Penetration by 4%. This effect stacks up to 5 times. [(removed) reduces target's Magic Defense by 6% and increases your ATK by 6% for 10 sec, stacks 6]
On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [10->5] times.

description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3times, and when healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.
